sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id UInt32, value String);
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (1, 'Hello World'), (2, 'Test String'), (3, 'Sample Text');
SELECT * FROM test_strings WHERE value NOT LIKE '%Test%';
UPDATE test_strings SET value = 'Updated Value' WHERE value NOT LIKE 'Sample%';
SELECT id FROM test_strings WHERE NOT(value NOT LIKE '%Hello%') AND value NOT LIKE '%Text%';
